semantic.role: Vitest configuration file that defines the unit test runner settings for the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Specifies the glob patterns for including test files (tests/**/*.test.ts, tests/**/*.bench.ts) and excluding e2e tests.
Sets a default test timeout of 60 seconds and hook timeout of 20 seconds.
outOfScope: Does not define or orchestrate any business logic.
Does not manage any domain or infrastructure concerns.
invariants: The configuration must be consumed by Vitest to determine which test files to run and under what timeout constraints.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a consistent test runner configuration for all unit and benchmark tests, excluding end-to-end tests from this configuration.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected from git intent; the file is in its initial or stable state.

publicSurface.description: Exports the Vitest configuration object consumed by the Vitest CLI or programmatic runner. It controls which test files are included, excluded, and the timeout values.
